indications.text:
VIMOVO is a combination product that contains naproxen and esomeprazole. It is indicated for
the relief of signs and symptoms of osteoarthritis, rheumatoid arthritis and ankylosing spondylitis
and to decrease the risk of developing gastric ulcers in patients at risk of developing NSAID-
associated g...
